name: Eggplant Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam 4 long Chinese eggplants in a shallow heat-proof dish over high heat for about 20 minutes or until tender. Test with a fork. Remove and let cool.
2. Tear the cooled eggplant into thin strips or cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
3. Refrigerate the eggplant pieces.
4. Soak the agar-agar in cold water for 10 seconds or until pliable, then drain and refrigerate.
5. In a small bowl, mix together grated ginger, finely minced garlic, minced green onions, coriander leaves, soy sauce, white vinegar, Chinese hot chili oil (or to taste), sesame oil, salt.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Arrange the agar-agar in a shallow platter. Toss the chilled eggplant with the vinaigrette dressing and scatter over the agar-agar.
8. Garnish with coriander sprigs and toasted sesame seeds.
